ber:D acu ara tinimt deg wass n usamas ay d-yetteddun﹖
ber:D acu ara tinid deg wass n usamas ay d-yetteddun﹖
ber:D acu ara tinim deg wass n usamas ay d-yetteddun﹖
ber:Ur tezmireḍ ad tserrḥeḍ deg tanglizit seg wass ar azekka
ber:D acu ara tinimt deg wass n lḥedd ay d-yetteddun﹖
ber:D acu ara tinim deg wass n lḥedd ay d-yetteddun﹖
ber:D acu ara tinid deg wass n lḥedd ay d-yetteddun﹖
ber:Ziri yezmer ad yesmeskir tamaziɣt yal ass, deg yiḍ, deg wass
ber:Yennum yettɣimi deg taddart deg wass n usiḍyas
ber:Ziri yeqqim kra yekka wass netta yettḍafar Rima
ber:Yanni yella qrib kra yekka wass netta yecɣel
ber:Cikkeɣ ass-a ad d-iwet unẓar kra yekka wass
ber:Yanni yeqqim kra yekka wass netta ixeddem aya
